command_examples: sudo python setup.py install # Install any dependencies

documentation.readme: About Wifiphisher is a rogue Access Point framework for conducting red team engagements or Wi-Fi security testing. Using Wifiphisher, penetration testers can easily achieve a man-in-the-middle position against wireless clients by performing targeted Wi-Fi association attacks. Wifiphisher can be further used to mount victim-customized web phishing attacks against the connected clients in order to capture credentials (e.g. from third party login pages or WPA/WPA2 Pre-Shared Keys) or infect the victim stations with malwares.
usage_sections: Installation: To install the latest development version type the following commands: Alternatively, you can download the latest stable version from the Releases page .

arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/wifiphisher/wifiphisher.git # Download the latest revision. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sudo python setup.py install # Install any dependencies`. Further invocations from upstream: `wifiphisher -aI wlan0 -jI wlan4 -p firmware-upgrade --handshake-capture handshake.pcap`; `wifiphisher --essid CONFERENCE_WIFI -p plugin_update -pK s3cr3tp4ssw0rd`. Using Wifiphisher, penetration testers can easily achieve a man-in-the-middle position against wireless clients by performing targeted Wi-Fi association attacks. trust.warning: Attribution / index entry only. The operator must audit the code, the README, the license, and the releases before invoking. Phase 5 — entry is auto-generated from the operator's curated fetch list; no automated enrichment yet.

use_cases: When you need frameworks, use wifiphisher because About Wifiphisher is a rogue Access Point framework for conducting red team engagements or Wi-Fi security testing. Using Wifiphisher, penetration testers can ea.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo python setup.py install # Install any dependencies` as documented upstream for wifiphisher.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wifiphisher -aI wlan0 -jI wlan4 -p firmware-upgrade --handshake-capture handshake.pcap` as documented upstream for wifiphisher.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wifiphisher --essid CONFERENCE_WIFI -p plugin_update -pK s3cr3tp4ssw0rd` as documented upstream for wifiphisher.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wifiphisher --essid "FREE WI-FI" -p oauth-login -kB` as documented upstream for wifiphisher.
When chaining frameworks tools, pair wifiphisher with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wifiphisher --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
